note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

new_registration.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

updated_information_i_have_updated_my.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

firm.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

address.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

bar_registration_number.guidance: An attorney's Maine bar registration number.

mailing_address.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

towncity_state_zip.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).
